svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="user-layer" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;arcSize=4;" value="User Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="1080" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user-lr" parent="user-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="Land Registry Officer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="180" x="30" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user-bank" parent="user-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="Bank Officer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="160" x="240" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user-notary" parent="user-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="Notary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="430" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user-public" parent="user-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="Public User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="160" x="600" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr-user-fe" edge="1" parent="1" source="user-layer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#666666;" target="fe-layer" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fe-layer" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#00264d;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;arcSize=4;" value="Frontend Layer — React / TypeScript (Vite)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="1080" x="40" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fe-dash" parent="fe-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#b3d9f7;strokeColor=#4a90d9;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Dashboard
Blockchain status monitoring
Real-time node health" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="220" x="20" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fe-reg" parent="fe-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#b3d9f7;strokeColor=#4a90d9;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Deed Registration
SHA-256 hash client-side
Document upload" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="220" x="260" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fe-verify" parent="fe-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#b3d9f7;strokeColor=#4a90d9;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Verify Deed
Public access, no auth
Hash comparison display" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="220" x="500" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fe-audit" parent="fe-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#b3d9f7;strokeColor=#4a90d9;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Audit Logs & Transfers
Superadmin only
CSV export" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="220" x="740" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr-fe-be" edge="1" parent="1" source="fe-layer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#666666;" target="be-layer" value="REST API (axios)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="be-layer" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#1a3d1a;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;arcSize=4;" value="Backend Layer — Node.js / Express.js" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="1080" x="40" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="be-auth" parent="be-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#b3d9b3;strokeColor=#5a9e5a;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="JWT Authentication
Admin + Superadmin roles
bcrypt passwords" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="20" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="be-fabric" parent="be-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#b3d9b3;strokeColor=#5a9e5a;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Fabric Gateway SDK
gRPC + TLS integration
X.509 certificate auth" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="260" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="be-fraud" parent="be-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#b3d9b3;strokeColor=#5a9e5a;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Fraud Detection
SHA-256 hash comparison
DB vs blockchain hashes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="500" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="be-retry" parent="be-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#b3d9b3;strokeColor=#5a9e5a;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Retry Service
Graceful degradation
Auto-retry every 60s" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="740" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr-be-db" edge="1" parent="1" source="be-layer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#666666;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="db-layer" value="Read / Write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr-be-bc" edge="1" parent="1" source="be-layer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#666666;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="bc-layer" value="Fabric Gateway SDK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db-layer" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#5c3d00;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;arcSize=4;" value="Database Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="500" x="40" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db-mongo" parent="db-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffe599;strokeColor=#c9a227;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="MongoDB Atlas
Deed metadata, owner info
Audit logs, users
Document hash (SHA-256)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="210" x="20" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db-cloud" parent="db-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffe599;strokeColor=#c9a227;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Cloudinary CDN
Encrypted deed documents
Off-chain file storage
URL ref in MongoDB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="210" x="260" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bc-layer" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#2d0045;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;arcSize=4;" value="Blockchain Layer — Hyperledger Fabric 2.5.4" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="500" x="620" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bc-orderer" parent="bc-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#d0b3e8;strokeColor=#7a4fa3;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Ordering Service" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="210" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bc-ca" parent="bc-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#d0b3e8;strokeColor=#7a4fa3;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Certificate Authority (CA)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="210" x="265" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bc-lr" parent="bc-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#d0b3e8;strokeColor=#7a4fa3;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Land Registry Peer
(R/W access)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="20" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bc-pb" parent="bc-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#d0b3e8;strokeColor=#7a4fa3;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Private Bank Peer
(Query only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="265" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bc-pub" parent="bc-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#d0b3e8;strokeColor=#7a4fa3;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Public Bank Peer
(Query only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="20" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bc-notary" parent="bc-layer" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#d0b3e8;strokeColor=#7a4fa3;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="Notary Peer
(Read only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="265" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
